overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene depicting a Hogwarts-style outdoor classroom under a wooden pavilion. Students in wizard robes gather around rustic work tables while mist drifts through the surrounding forest. The camera remains stationary, capturing the atmospheric morning light and character movements within the semi-enclosed learning space.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor wooden classroom pavilion in misty forest

agents.ego_description: student character in pointed hat and dark robes walking around the central work table, observing the classroom environment

notable_agents.action: student in green-trimmed robes standing at the left work table, facing the instructor's area
group of students gathered near the back table, appearing to work on class assignments

entered.detail: rustic timber roof structure with exposed beams providing partial cover
heavy wooden table with scattered papers and magical supplies
misty deciduous forest with tall trees and green undergrowth visible through open pavilion sides
thick timber posts supporting the pavilion roof structure
weathered stone tile flooring covering the pavilion ground

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a stationary view of an outdoor wizarding classroom set within a wooden pavilion. A student character wearing a pointed hat moves around the central work table while other students in house robes stand at their stations. Mist drifts through the forest visible beyond the open sides of the structure, and the diffused morning light creates a warm, atmospheric learning environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a stationary perspective of an atmospheric outdoor wizarding classroom nestled within a wooden pavilion. It begins with a view of students in house robes gathered at rustic stations, where a student in a pointed hat moves around a central work table. As the scene unfolds, the diffused morning light enhances the warm glow of the learning environment. The focus remains on the quiet activity within the structure while mist continuously drifts through the surrounding forest visible beyond the open sides.
